html:
Exclusive to:

The Cactus Armor is a craftable Armor introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be crafted with 1 Log Suit and 3 Cactus Spike, and requires an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype.

It has 450 durability and absorbs 80% of physical damage like the Log Suit used to craft it. Whenever a Character wearing the Cactus Armor is hit by a Mob, it will deal 17 damage to the attacker, even if the attack was projectile such as those used by MacTusk or Clockwork Bishop. This damage is not affected by characters with damage modifiers. Unlike the Log Suit, the Cactus Armor is non-flammable. Wearing the armor will cause the Elephant Cactus to ignore the player, and grants immunity to its attack, but attacking it with a Melee Weapon still does damage to the player.

Tips

  • Cactus Armor's ability is not useful while on a boat, since the vessel is the one that takes full damage. This means critters such as Stink Rays, Ballphins, Floaty Boaty Knights or Crocodogs won't get hurt when attacking the armored player on the sea.
    • This even includes Jellyfish, despite being the only sea critter that can harm the player's health directly.
  • Shadow Creatures do take damage when attacking the player. However, they won't disappear and respawn in the proximity of the player when successfully hit, as they usually do.

Trivia

  • The Cactus Armor was added in the Release the Quacken update.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Willow wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Wolfgang wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Wendy wearing Cactus Armor.
  • WX-78 wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Wickerbottom wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Woodie wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Wes wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Maxwell wearing a Cactus Armor.
  • Wigfrid wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Webber wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Walani wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Warly wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Wilbur wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Woodlegs wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Wilba wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Wormwood wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Wheeler wearing Cactus Armor.
  • Cactus Armor as seen in the poster for the Release the Quacken update.

"armorcactus"
“The best defense is a good offense.”
–Wilson
“This way I won't get burned by those cacti.”
–Willow
“Hah! Try hit Wolfgang now.”
–Wolfgang
“It makes me as prickly outside as I am inside!”
–Wendy
“SENDING CACTUS FRIEND REQUEST...”
–WX-78
“This allows for anonymity among the cacti.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pretty prickly protection, eh?”
–Woodie
“Nothing says "stay away" quite like this.”
–Maxwell
“Defensive clothing constructed from contentious cactus projectiles.”
–Wagstaff
“It will make öf me a friend tö the cactus.”
–Wigfrid
“Weaponized hugs!”
–Webber
“How will I hug trees in this?”
–Walani
“If the enemies are pricked half as much as I was making it, it's worth it.”
–Warly
“Me'd like ta see them try ta hit Woodlegs now!”
–Woodlegs
“BY THE PRICKING OF MINE ARMOR”
–Wilba
“Friend clothes”
–Wormwood
“All the rage with the dangerous vegetation crowd.”
–Wheeler
The Cactus Armor is a craftable Armor introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be crafted with 1 Log Suit and 3 Cactus Spike, and requires an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype.
It has 450 durability and absorbs 80% of physical damage like the Log Suit used to craft it. Whenever a Character wearing the Cactus Armor is hit by a Mob, it will deal 17 damage to the attacker, even if the attack was projectile such as those used by MacTusk or Clockwork Bishop. This damage is not affected by characters with damage modifiers. Unlike the Log Suit, the Cactus Armor is non-flammable. Wearing the armor will cause the Elephant Cactus to ignore the player, and grants immunity to its attack, but attacking it with a Melee Weapon still does damage to the player.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Cactus Armor's ability is not useful while on a boat, since the vessel is the one that takes full damage. This means critters such as Stink Rays, Ballphins, Floaty Boaty Knights or Crocodogs won't get hurt when attacking the armored player on the sea.
This even includes Jellyfish, despite being the only sea critter that can harm the player's health directly.
Shadow Creatures do take damage when attacking the player. However, they won't disappear and respawn in the proximity of the player when successfully hit, as they usually do.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Cactus Armor was added in the Release the Quacken update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Giáp Xương Rồng là Giáp chế tạo được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó có thể được chế tạo bằng 1 Bộ đồ gỗ và 3 Mũi nhọn xương rồng, đồng thời yêu cầu Máy luyện kim hoặc Phòng thí nghiệm biển để tạo nguyên mẫu.
